name: ESC Burn-in Jump Mission Logic
description: You are an Agricultural Technician preparing a heavy-lift crop sprayer drone for a 'burn-in' test flight following motor and ESC replacement. Based on the engineering test specification at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/burn_in_spec.txt, configure the 'WPNAV_SPEED' parameter to 1200 cm/s. Create a mission plan that includes a takeoff, a circuit of at least 4 navigation waypoints, a DO_JUMP command repeating the circuit 25 times by jumping to the first waypoint, and a final RTL command. Save the completed mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/burn_in.plan. Do not arm the vehicle.
